---
title: ""
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.home-hero}

```{=html}
<div class="youtube-hero-background" aria-hidden="true">

<iframe
src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/ZRJVnwGwWIQ?autoplay=1&mute=1&loop=1&playlist=ZRJVnwGwWIQ&controls=0&rel=0&playsinline=1&disablekb=1&fs=0&modestbranding=1"
title="The Green Yard Homepage Background"
frameborder="0"
allow="autoplay; encrypted-media"
allowfullscreen>
</iframe>

</div>
```

::: {.home-hero-overlay}
:::

::: {.home-hero-content}

# What does abundance look like around the world?

Join us as we explore food forests, edible landscapes, and the inspiring people creating abundance through plants and food in different places.

::: {.home-hero-buttons}

[Explore the Tours](videos.qmd){.hero-button .hero-button-primary}

[▶ Watch on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@thegreenyardaz){.hero-button .hero-button-secondary target="_blank"}

:::

:::

:::

## Welcome to The Green Yard

More coming soon...
